description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Persism CMS 0.9.2 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the system[path] parameter to (1) blocks/headerfile.php, (2) files/blocks/latest_files.php, (3) filters/headerfile.php, (4) forums/blocks/latest_posts.php, (5) groups/headerfile.php, (6) links/blocks/links.php, (7) menu/headerfile.php, (8) news/blocks/latest_news.php, (9) settings/headerfile.php, or (10) users/headerfile.php, in modules/.
